title: US Harmonized Tariff Schedule
description: Browse and search the full US HTS tariff classification data from hts.usitc.gov. Updated from the USITC public API. [Source code on GitHub](https://github.com/francisfuzz/tariff-everywhere).

hts_entries.description_html: Tariff line items with duty rates, units, and classification hierarchy. Search uses full-text search on the description column. To look up a specific HTS code, use the column filter rather than the search box.

chapters.description_html: HTS chapters 01-99. Click a chapter to see its tariff entries.

browse_chapters.description_html: All 99 HTS chapters with entry counts. Click a chapter number to browse its tariff entries.
